description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:12 Docker image and caches the .npm and node_modules directories with a cache key based on ${CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG}. Define two stages, test and deploy. In the test stage add a test job that runs the before_script commands `npm i npm@latest -g`, `npm ci --cache .npm --prefer-offline`, `git config --global user.email "test@example.com"`, `git config --global user.name "Visual Fiha CI Tests"` and then executes `npm test`. In the deploy stage add a pages job that runs the before_script commands `npm i npm@latest -g` and `npm ci`, then runs `npm run build`, publishes the `public/` directory as a pages artifact, and is limited to the master branch.
